name: Group 3 final comfort diagnostic: estimated buckets, packet GPS, connectors

properties.position_estimation_note: Distance uses packet avg_speed over the 25s window; heading uses reverse bearing from previous received GPS to current GPS. Packet drops remain visible as larger interpolation_gap_s and weaker quality.
properties.roughness_proxy_formula: 0.70*rms_norm + 0.20*max(peak_norm, crest_factor_norm_3_to_9) + 0.10*vibration_pct/100; rms/peak normalized by this final export p90
